email.subject: Full Stack Developer interested in the remote role at XBS

Hi Praveen,

I came across your post about the Full Stack Engineer role at Xcubated Business Solutions and the remote setup with a focus on building with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL really caught my attention. I have been working as a Full Stack Developer for about 2.6 years, building production applications with React.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and AWS, and I also work extensively with TypeScript in my day-to-day projects. While I have not worked with React Native or NestJS professionally, my strong foundation across the rest of your stack makes me confident I can ramp up quickly. I have attached my resume for your review and would love to discuss how I can contribute to your team.
